description: Original packaging came with a nipopo wooden figurine.
title: Hokkaidō Serial Murder Case: Disappearances in Okhotsk
Original_Platform_format_and_price: Floppy Disk (6,800 JPY); Cassette Tape (3,800 JPY)
Sixth_Release: July 16, 2003 (feature phone: J-スカイ); 300 JPY +tax /month (feature phone: i-αppli); 300 JPY +tax /month
Additional_Notes: From January 30, 2021 to February 28, 2021, Hokkaido Railway Company held an event in which the Tourist Train of the Drift-Ice-Stories collaborated with this game. Some people count this game among the "Horii Mystery Trilogy"—three video games whose screenplays were written by Horii Yūji.
